entries.title: Solar System
entries.content: Sun plus eight planets: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune. Asteroid belt between Mars and Jupiter; Kuiper belt beyond Neptune.

entries.title: Speed of Light
entries.content: Light travels at ~299,792 km/s in vacuum. Nothing with mass can reach this speed. Light from Sun reaches Earth in about 8 minutes 20 seconds.

entries.title: Black Holes
entries.content: Regions where gravity is so strong that not even light escapes. Formed when massive stars collapse. Event horizon marks point of no return.

entries.title: Phases of the Moon
entries.content: Caused by relative positions of Sun, Earth, and Moon. Full cycle (~29.5 days): new → waxing → full → waning → new.

entries.title: Big Bang Theory
entries.content: Universe began ~13.8 billion years ago from extremely hot, dense state and has been expanding since. Supported by cosmic microwave background radiation.
